prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock M96/80 3.2L twin-turbo flat-6 (internally coded 'GT1-98') with a fully built version featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons, paired with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Peterson Fluid Systems (4-stage, 12L capacity) to eliminate oil starvation under sustained 2.5G lateral loads.

Forced Induction: Upgrade the stock KKK K27 turbochargers to a pair of Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (88mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves, feeding into a custom 4.5" titanium intercooler core by PWR with billet end tanks and CNC-machined charge pipes from Forgeline Motorsports.

Fuel & Ignition: Replace the stock Bosch Motronic ME7.1 ECU with a standalone Motec M182 ECU, paired with a dual-channel PDM (Power Distribution Module) from Life Racing. Fuel system upgrades include a set of 12x ID2000 injectors (primary) and 4x ID1700X injectors (secondary) with a Radium Engineering dual-pump fuel surge tank (2x Walbro 450LPH pumps) and a custom billet fuel rail by Injector Dynamics. Ignition system features a set of MSD 8517 coils and NGK R8471-10B spark plugs (0.8mm gap) for sustained 9,000 RPM operation.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Replace the stock GT1 bodywork with a full carbon-fiber aero kit by 9ff, including a 3-piece front splitter with integrated dive planes, a 2.5m rear wing with adjustable carbon-fiber Gurney flaps (30mm height), and a custom diffuser with 5 strakes and a central venturi tunnel. Side skirts feature integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, and the rear bumper is replaced with a 9ff-designed unit featuring a central exhaust exit for a single 120mm titanium exhaust tip by Akrapovic.

Chassis & Wheels: Install a full carbon-fiber monocoque reinforcement kit by GTSport, including a roll cage with integrated door bars (FIA Appendix J compliant) and a carbon-fiber floor pan with integrated fuel cell mounts. Wheels are custom 18x12" (front) and 18x13" (rear) forged magnesium units by Dymag (CX-R model), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/645R18 front, 345/680R18 rear). Braking system features 6-piston AP Racing calipers (front) and 4-piston calipers (rear) with 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors by Surface Transforms (ST-XR series).

Interior: Replace the stock GT1 interior with a full carbon-fiber monocoque tub by Sparco, featuring a 6-point harness (Schroth Profi II 6 ASM), a carbon-fiber racing seat (Sparco Pro ADV), and a custom dash panel with a 7" Motec C187 dash logger. The steering wheel is a custom 350mm unit by MOMO (carbon-fiber with Alcantara grip) featuring integrated paddle shifters for the sequential gearbox. The shift lever is replaced with a billet aluminum unit by CAE, and the pedals are adjustable aluminum units by Tilton.
